text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna invites me out for a slightly<n>late New
Year's shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow... The New Year's festivities are<n>already
over, but there are still so<n>many people here!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, speaking of the midwinter<n>crowds, this
reminds me of last<n>year's Arima Kinen.
choice_data_list: That's right, there was a huge turnout!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't there?! It's the big year-end<n>event, after
all! The perfect end to all<n>the G1 races that start
in autumn!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And on the topic of the Arima Kinen,<n>it's a really
important race for so<n>many Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Only the chosen few can stand upon<n>that
stage—the ones who performed<n>the best that
year and won the hearts<n>of the fans...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Racers from every generation dream<n>of standing
tall at Nakayama<n>Racecourse at the end of the
year.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That's right... They all yearn for it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And somehow, I feel that yearning<n>too! I know
it's a little far away, but<n>why don't we head to
Nakayama<n>Racecourse for a quick peek?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Visiting a shrine for the New<n>Year is great
and all, but the bustle of<n>the racetrack is on a
whole other level!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There are people at the racetrack to<n>watch
Umamusume run today as well.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Please continue to support<n>your trainee.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'll be rooting for the both of you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that my friendship<n>with Tazuna
will continue to grow from<n>here.
